title: When Workspace Templates (AKA Solution apps) release, will it be possible to include Dashboards?
excerpt: We want to distribute several pre-built Dashboards with board templates (native Monday dashboards, just to save users lots of time getting started with our app). Wondering if the upcoming Workspace templates will allow u…

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: We want to distribute several pre-built Dashboards with board templates (native Monday dashboards, just to save users lots of time getting started with our app). Wondering if the upcoming Workspace templates will allow us to package up dashboard templates, just like board templates.

posts.author: avirampm (Aviram Marom)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @PolishedGeek,

Aviram here, a product manager from monday.com.
Regarding your question - it’s definitely the plan…(

Thanks for the feedback!

Aviram

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Good answer, lol. Because when we submitted our Apps contest entry, we went forward ''as if" this will be possible. Hope workspace templates come out soon, but I realize they are complicated.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @PolishedGeek

Thanks for reaching out with the question and creating the opportunity to align here It’s a great question too!

I’m glad @avirampm was able to shed a bit more light on this, and I appreciate your patience and understanding as we keep on improving our feature set here

-Alex
